brief.objective: introduce CALL as a leadership development and improvement planning tool
keyMessages: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.
proofPoints: The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
The CALL site says CALL provides unique tools and customized services for professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
The What We Do page says CALL is school- and district-wide.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement.
Leadership for learning, grounded in feedback
A practical system for school improvement planning
subheadOptions: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning provides tools, customized services, and feedback systems that support school and district.
CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
copy.body: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement. For principals, this draft focuses on leadership for learning, professional growth, and school improvement planning.
bullets: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.
The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement.
fittedCopy.deck: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for leadership development, professional growth, and school improvement planning.
proofPoints: A user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
Supports leadership development, professional growth, and school improvement planning.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: campaign flyer hierarchy with a dominant leadership-focused headline, concise explanatory deck, two proof points integrated below, and a compact CTA anchored in the lower rhythm
designRecipe.artDirection: full-bleed 4:5 flyer concept for school principals featuring a confident, improvement-focused educational atmosphere on the right: authentic school leadership in action, collaborative walkthrough or planning moment, warm professional light, modern institutional credibility, and a calm evidence-driven tone that feels practical, trustworthy, and district-ready
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: reserve the left editorial field through composition, negative space, contrast falloff, and subject eyeline/orientation; imply logo and CTA ownership without rendering any substitute marks or text elements
designRecipe.appComposition: left-led editorial stack for all live copy and official branding, with the right-side photographic narrative cropped to shape the page, support the proof band below, and maintain clean readability across the full flyer artifact
promptDirectives: design the entire flyer concept with integrated hierarchy and atmosphere, not a standalone background
use a right-side school leadership scene that signals principal-facing improvement planning and instructional leadership
keep the left field clean and high-contrast for app-owned headline, deck, proof points, logo, and CTA
avoid fake text, fake logos, document mockups, UI cards, contact bars, or placeholder boxes

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CALL prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): fake dashboard, stock workshop.

layoutQa.question: Would I send this layout to the WCEPS team without apology?
issues: Deck copy is too tall for the selected template.

warnings: Deck and proof copy repeat the same idea instead of creating a clear message hierarchy.

visualQa.question: Would I send this visual system to the WCEPS team without apology?

modelQa.question: Would a senior WCEPS reviewer send this artifact without apology?
issues: Deck copy is too tall for the selected template, creating a real hierarchy and sendability problem for export.

Prompt guardrails were somewhat incomplete for known generic education-art risks, even though the resulting image remained acceptable.

CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Create a portrait 1024x1536 full-bleed campaign art plate for a school leadership flyer concept, designed as a premium editorial split composition with a clean left editorial text field reserved through negative space and contrast falloff, and a right-side visual narrative showing an authentic principal-facing school improvement meeting. The right field should feature a confident principal and leadership team in a calm, strategic discussion over feedback reports and school improvement planning materials, with educator collaboration, reflective energy, and data-informed conversation implied only through non-readable papers and gestures; no close-up faces, no detailed hands, no stock workshop posing. Keep the left side high-contrast and uncluttered to support app-owned headline and copy, but render no text or fake layout elements. Use a polished education-sector aesthetic with layered depth, rich but controlled visual density, natural editorial lighting, and a calm leadership-focused mood. Color palette should align to deep navy #142836, teal #0081A4, green #5EA974, and warm accent #F2975E, integrated subtly in wardrobe, environment, lighting, and graphic atmosphere. The scene should feel like leadership for learning, professional growth, and school improvement planning, with credible school context and premium NY ad-agency quality. Avoid any readable text, letters, numbers, charts, logos, badges, icons, UI cards, document panels, contact bars, fake charts, fake logos, wordmarks, or brochure scaffolding. Keep all important energy away from the trim edges, with intentional crop-safe composition and a type-safe left zone.

request.goal: introduce CALL as a leadership development and improvement planning tool
request.topic: leadership for learning, professional growth, and school improvement planning
request.notes: Keep claims conservative because CALL copy must stay tightly source-bounded.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: A user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL homepage description

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) provides unique tools and customized services to support professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL professional growth and leadership development

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement. Focus on the work.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL focus

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) is a school- and district-wide leadership assessment and feedback system.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL What We Do
